name: tenant-b
description: Messy tenant. Legacy auth not blocked, no admin-specific policy, MFA policy with 14 user exclusions (six inactive 90+ days), two stale report-only policies, one disabled policy from 2024, and no risk-based policies.
notes: calibrated against rules engine v0.0.1; CRITICAL admin-MFA gap matches the 'no admin-specific policy' scenario tag.

signin_scenarios.name: baseline
signin_scenarios.description: 30 days of normal behaviour, no injected anomalies.

signin_scenarios.name: replay-attacks
signin_scenarios.description: Baseline plus scripted impossible-travel, MFA bypass, off-hours admin, credential stuffing, new ASN.

signin_scenarios.name: noisy
signin_scenarios.description: Operationally noisy normals plus the same scripted attacks.

anomaly_calibration.pipeline: per-user IsolationForest(n=200, random_state=42) + cold-start pooled IF + 4 hybrid rules + off-hours-admin rule
anomaly_calibration.notes: Sprint 3.5 per-user architecture; tenant-b has 30 users all above the 30-signin threshold, so cold-start pooled is dormant. Recall meets the 0.80 floor on attacks; precision sits below the 0.40 target for the same reason as tenant-a (rules drive recall but trip on rare-but-legitimate events). The off-hours-admin rule fires on the injected scenario via the per-user time model anchor.
